title: Do not make every corner sharp in the name of professionalism
summary: AI agents overcorrect from pill-everything by making every corner 0px, creating harsh, unapproachable interfaces.
instruction: Use radius as part of the product's shape language. Zero-radius on all surfaces is as much a default as pill-radius. Choose radius values that support the product's character and readability.
rationale: Sharp corners on everything is the opposite default - just as unthinking as rounding everything. Interactive elements benefit from slight rounding (2-4px) for visual approachability. Zero-radius everywhere creates visual harshness.
violations: An enterprise dashboard where cards, inputs, buttons, modals, and badges all have border-radius: 0px.
A medical app interface with zero-radius on every element, including buttons and interactive controls.
controls: An enterprise dashboard with 4px on cards, 6px on buttons, 0px on data tables (functional role separation).
A professional tool with 2px radius on interactive elements and 0px on data containers.
borderlineCases: A command-line inspired interface where zero-radius is part of the terminal aesthetic.
contextualExceptions: Architecture or CAD tools where precision aesthetics demand sharp corners.
Print-style editorial where zero-radius is intentional.
detectorSignal: Every surface-element in the codebase uses border-radius: 0
matcherProposal: Count all border-radius declarations. If 90%+ are 0px or 0, flag. Also count elements without any border-radius (implicit 0).
detectorLimitations: Elements without border-radius declaration inherit - they are not intentionally 0px.
Tailwind 'rounded-none' is explicit; absence of 'rounded-*' is implicit.
falsePositiveScenarios: A data-dense admin interface where zero-radius on ALL surfaces is the product's design direction.
A mobile OS-level interface component where platform conventions use 0px.
mitigationStrategy: Flag only when radius: 0 appears on interactive elements (buttons, inputs), not on structural containers.

fixturePlans.violation: A form with <input style='border-radius: 0'>, <button style='border-radius: 0'>, <select style='border-radius: 0'>.
fixturePlans.control: A form with <input style='border-radius: 4px'>, <button style='border-radius: 6px'>, <select style='border-radius: 4px'>.
fixturePlans.borderline: A terminal-themed admin panel with 0px radius everywhere and documentation stating the design direction.

overlapNotes: Counterpoint to radius.everything-pill. Both are defaults that should be replaced with intentional choice.
